rationale: PDF p.60 row 3 ACSEQ: 'Sequence Number | Num | Identifier | [definition: Sequence number given to ensure uniqueness within a dataset. Allows inclusion of multiple records for the same ACPARMCD.]' — atom verbatim matches PDF cell values exactly across all 12 columns. parent_section uses '§5.1.7 Challenge Agent Characterization' without bracket notation; per N11/N27 extension, L3 headings should use chapter-short-bracket form '§5.1.7 [Challenge Agent Characterization]'.

PDF p.61 top heading '5.2 Study References' matches atom verbatim exactly. parent_section '§5 [STUDY-LEVEL DATA]' correctly identifies the L1 ancestor with chapter-short-bracket form per N27. schema fields heading_level=2 and sibling_index=2 present as required for HEADING atom_type.

PDF p.62 sentence 'The identity of a non-host organism is established by means of a number of taxa (categories used to classify living things), then assigned an identifier.' matches atom verbatim exactly. parent_section '§5.2.2 Non-host Organism Identifiers Dataset' is missing bracket notation; per N11/N27 extension applied to L3, canonical form should be '§5.2.2 [Non-host Organism Identifiers Dataset]'.

PDF p.63 is entirely a concept map figure titled 'Concept Map. Relationships Between Non-host Organism Identifier Variables'; atom uses '[FIGURE: Concept Map showing relationships between Non-host Organism Identifier Variables]' which is acceptable per schema FIGURE convention. figure_ref 'pdf_p063+top' present and correctly formatted. parent_section '§5.2.2 Non-host Organism Identifiers Dataset' missing bracket notation per N11/N27 extension.

PDF p.64 RELREC row 3 USUBJID definition reads 'A sequence of characters used by the sponsor to uniquely identify a subject across all studies for all applications or submissions involving the product.' — atom verbatim omits 'by the sponsor', rendering it 'used to uniquely identify a subject' which is a verbatim truncation. parent_section '§6.1 [Related Records Dataset]' uses correct bracket form per N28 L2-active rule.

PDF p.65 RELREC continuation row 6 SPDEVID: 'Sponsor Device Identifier | Char | Identifier | C117060 | A sequence of characters used by the sponsor to uniquely identify a specific device.' matches atom verbatim across all 12 columns exactly. parent_section '§6.1 [Related Records Dataset]' correctly persists L2-active state across page boundary from p.64 per N28.

PDF p.66 SUPP-- table row 8 IDVARVAL: 'Identifying Variable Value | Char | Identifier | [no C-code] | Value of identifying variable of the parent record(s).' matches atom verbatim exactly including empty C-code cell and definition. parent_section '§6.2 [Supplemental Qualifiers Dataset]' correctly uses bracket form for active L2 heading per N28.

PDF p.67 introductory sentence for §6.3: 'This dataset identifies individual subjects included in a pool of subjects for which a single observation record (pool level) is captured.' matches atom verbatim exactly. parent_section '§6.3 [Pool Definition Dataset]' correctly uses bracket form for L2 active heading per N28.

PDF p.68 §6.6 sentence: 'The APRELSUB dataset, which parallels the structure of the RELSUB dataset, was created as a more efficient and simpler way to record these multiple relationships.' matches atom verbatim exactly. parent_section '§6.6 [Associated Persons Relationships]' correctly uses bracket form for L2 active heading per N28.

PDF p.69 RELSPEC table header contains all 12 columns: '# | Variable Name | Variable Label | Type | Format | Role | Variable(s) Qualified | Usage Restrictions | Variable C-code | Definition | Notes | Examples' — atom verbatim matches all 12 column names in correct order. parent_section '§6.7 [Related Specimens Dataset]' correctly uses bracket form per N28.
